think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify and extract all advertisement segments from the provided video.

1.  **Analyze the video for advertisements:**
    *   **01:57 - 02:44:** The hosts introduce a sponsor, Yahoo Finance. The screen behind them displays the Yahoo Finance logo. They discuss the features of the website. This is clearly a sponsored segment/advertisement.
    *   **08:47 - 09:11:** A commercial for Starbucks plays. It shows baristas writing names on cups and customers enjoying their drinks. The text "Your pick-me-up is ready" appears. This is a standard commercial break.
    *   **11:30 - 14:38:** A long, humorous commercial for Pepsi plays. It's set in ancient Rome with gladiators and features the song "We Will Rock You". This is a standard commercial break.
    *   **19:08 - 20:08:** A black and white commercial for Nike plays, featuring various female athletes. The text "YOU CAN'T WIN. SO WIN." appears. This is a standard commercial break.

2.  **Extract details for each segment:**

    *   **Segment 1 (Yahoo Finance):**
        *   Start Time: 01:57
        *   End Time: 02:44
        *   Transcript: "Now a word from our sponsor, Yahoo Finance. Neil, it was a red day in the market yesterday. I prefer to think about it as the indexes were blushing because they couldn't keep up with the AI advancements coming out of China. Interesting way to cope with the sell-off, but if you don't just want to cope and instead want to educate yourself check out Yahoo Finance. One quick scan of their homepage and you can see the news driving the markets lousy day. And if you want to go deeper, that's where its research tab comes into play. You can use its stock comparison tool to weigh a company's fundamentals or pay for Yahoo Finance's premiums here to get expert investment ideas and research reports. It's all there and it's all waiting for you at yahoofinance.com."
        *   Scene Description: The hosts are sitting at their desk. The screen behind them changes to show the Yahoo Finance logo. They talk directly to the camera and each other about the sponsor.
        *   Summary: The hosts introduce Yahoo Finance as a sponsor, highlighting its features like market news, research tools, and premium investment ideas, encouraging viewers to visit their website.

    *   **Segment 2 (Starbucks):**
        *   Start Time: 08:47
        *   End Time: 09:11
        *   Transcript: (Music and ambient sounds, no clear dialogue transcript provided in the prompt, but visual context is clear).
        *   Scene Description: A montage of Starbucks baristas preparing drinks, writing names on cups with markers, and handing them to smiling customers. The text "Your pick-me-up is ready" appears on screen.
        *   Summary: A commercial for Starbucks showcasing their personalized service and the return of writing names on cups, emphasizing a welcoming atmosphere for customers.

    *   **Segment 3 (Pepsi):**
        *   Start Time: 11:30
        *   End Time: 14:38
        *   Transcript: "We will, we will rock you! ¡Gracias! Thank you. Buddy, you're a boy, make a big noise, playing in the street, gonna be a big man someday, you got mud on your face, a big disgrace, kicking your can all over the place. Thank you. ¡No! We'll be right back. Yeah. So we will be Oh yeah, buddy, you're a young man, hard man, fighting in the streets, gonna click on the world someday. Blood on your face, big disgrace, whether you've been all over the place, yeah. We will love you Oh yeah! Buddy, you're an old man, poor man. Wheatin' with your eyes gonna make you some peace someday. You got mud on your face, big disgrace. Somebody better put you back into your place."
        *   Scene Description: A humorous commercial set in ancient Rome featuring gladiators, a Roman emperor, and a crowd. It parodies the song "We Will Rock You" and features Pepsi cans being distributed and consumed by the gladiators and the emperor.
        *   Summary: A comedic Pepsi commercial set in a Roman coliseum where gladiators and the emperor enjoy Pepsi, set to a parody of Queen's "We Will Rock You".

    *   **Segment 4 (Nike):**
        *   Start Time: 19:08
        *   End Time: 20:08
        *   Transcript: "can't be demanding. You can't be relentless. You can't put yourself first. So... Put yourself first. You can't be confident. So be confident. So challenge. You can't dominate. dominate. Can't flex. Flex. Play. You can't fill a stadium. Fill that stadium. Thank you. You can't be emotional. Thank you. So be in. a motion. Thank you. You can't take credit. You can't speak up. You can't be so ambitious. You can't break records. You can't have any fun. You can't make demands. You can't keep score. You can't stand out. Whatever you do, you can't win. Can't be. You can't keep scoring. So win."
        *   Scene Description: A black and white montage of various female athletes (basketball, gymnastics, track, volleyball, etc.) training and competing. Text overlays appear with motivational phrases like "YOU CAN'T WIN. SO WIN."
        *   Summary: A motivational Nike commercial featuring a montage of female athletes overcoming challenges and excelling in their sports, culminating in the slogan "You can't win. So win."
